findings.summary: Expected character-creation route witnesses reused observed replay helpers, so route evidence was self-referential.
findings.resolution: Added adapter-local QNT literal expected-route witnesses in src/qnt_adapters/character_creation_expected_routes.rs and changed character-creation expected_route functions to use those literals instead of replay_observed_route.

findings.summary: Production class-feature rules dispatched on official selected identities for order, weapon mastery, and metamagic facts.
findings.resolution: Replaced those production entrypoints with admitted support fact shapes: ClassFeatureProjectionFacts, ClassOrderFacts, WeaponMasteryFacts, and MetamagicOptionKey-based facts. Official selected labels now map to facts in adapters/tests.

findings.summary: Evidence artifacts overclaimed convergence before the independent witness and authored-identity fixes existed.
findings.resolution: Updated review, state-owner, engine-depth, decider, and validation-report artifacts to describe the repaired evidence boundary and support-fact production APIs.

rounds.summary: RAW/QNT, domain, route ownership, support admission, and adapter quarantine pass found no reasonable findings after implementation.
Second convergence pass found no remaining reasonable findings; out-of-scope level 6 Rogue route remains represented by source scope rather than target blocker.

Fixer pass repaired self-referential route expectations, moved production semantics to admitted support facts, and updated artifact claims. No remaining reasonable findings were accepted after the focused recheck.
